---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DOMANGCHA
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. For example: "I find it frustrating when ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible about how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why you prefer your proposed approach.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, examples, or references that would help understand the request.
